senses.definition: without a body; lacking a body or a physical form
examples: The sculpture was strangely bodyless, appearing more like a silhouette.
In the story, the ghost is a bodyless figure drifting through the rooms.

senses.definition: a line or contour of the body, often used in fashion or automotive contexts to describe the outer shape
examples: The dress emphasizes the body's line.
The car's bodyline is sleek and aerodynamic.

senses.definition: plural of bodyline; the contours or lines of the body
examples: The tattoo follows the bodylines of her arm.
He studied bodylines to improve his figure drawing.

senses.definition: a person or device that creates or shapes a body; can refer to a tailor, sculptor, or a machine that forms a body for a statue or prosthesis
examples: The artist is a skilled bodymaker for sculpture.
A bodymaker machine shapes the metal into a torso.

senses.definition: the process of forming or shaping a body, often used in sculpture, anatomy, or cosplay contexts
examples: Bodymaking requires careful study of anatomy.
She specializes in bodymaking for props.

senses.definition: a man who works on or repairs vehicle bodies; a body shop worker
examples: The bodyman fixed the dent in the car door.
He works as a bodyman at the auto repair shop.

senses.definition: plural of bodyman; multiple workers who repair vehicle bodies
examples: The shop hired two bodymen to speed up the repairs.
Bodymen collaborated with painters on the project.

senses.definition: a plate forming part of a body or protective covering; in medical or mechanical contexts, a plate on a body part
examples: The bodyplate protects the chest in the armor.
A sternum bodyplate was added to the prosthetic.

senses.definition: the outer shell of a body, especially the external frame of a car, spacecraft, or biological construct
examples: The damaged bodyshell was replaced.
Study the bodyshell to understand the vehicle's aerodynamics.

senses.definition: plural of bodyshell; multiple outer shells of bodies (cars, spacecraft, etc.)
examples: We shipped two bodyshells for analysis.
Bodyshells are often reinforced for safety.

senses.definition: a shirt or top that covers the torso or chest area; often used in fashion or athletic contexts
examples: She wore a snug bodyshirt under the jacket.
The gym bodshirt is moisture-wicking.

senses.definition: the side of the body; often used in anatomy or fashion descriptions
examples: He brushed a strand from his bodyside.
The dress emphasizes the bodyside curve.

senses.definition: plural of bodyside; the sides of the body
examples: He marked the bodysides with paint to illustrate anatomy.
The garment hugged the bodysides.

senses.definition: a one-piece garment covering the torso and often the legs or arms
examples: She wore a black bodysuit for the dance performance.
Bodysuits are popular in fashion and gymnastics.

senses.definition: plural of bodysuit; multiple one-piece garments
examples: She owns several bodysuits in different colors.
Bodysuits are worn in dance and photography.

senses.definition: to ride a wave on one's body without a board
examples: They went to the beach to bodysurf at dawn.
He bodysurfs better than most surfers without a board.

senses.definition: past tense of bodysurf; rode waves on one's body
examples: They bodysurfed all afternoon.
She bodysurfed to cool off after the run.

senses.definition: a person who bodysurfs
examples: He is a skilled bodysurfer.
The crowd watched the bodysurfers ride the big waves.

senses.definition: plural of bodysurfer; multiple people who bodysurf
examples: The beach attracted many bodysurfers during the festival.
Two bodysurfers fell but laughed it off.

senses.definition: the activity or sport of riding waves on the body without a board
examples: Bodysurfing is simpler but thrilling.
They learned bodysurfing from a pro.

senses.definition: plural of bodysurfing; instances or sessions of bodysurfing
examples: They recorded several bodysurfings from the trip.
The event featured multiple bodysurfings throughout the day.

senses.definition: third-person singular present of bodysurf; rides waves on the body
examples: He bodysurfs whenever the waves are good.
She bodysurfs to cool off after practice.

senses.definition: a liquid soap used for cleaning the body; a bath product
examples: She bought a lavender bodywash.
The bodywash lathers well.

senses.definition: plural of bodywash; various body cleansing products
examples: Different bodywashes cater to different skin types.
Two bodywashes were on sale.

senses.definition: clothing worn on the body; everyday garments or specialized attire
examples: Sports bodywear helps with movement.
We sell bodywear for yoga classes.
